lines.speaker: Gravingas
lines.text: Will you join with me and protest against the evil ban of Necrovarus and his disciples?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I don't really think I should get involved.

lines.speaker: Gravingas
lines.text: Ah, the youth of today - so apathetic to politics.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you still protesting? I have commanded Necrovarus to let you and your friends do as you like! There's no need for this anymore!

lines.speaker: Gravingas
lines.text: There's always a need for a healthy interest in politics.

lines.speaker: Gravingas
lines.text: Rise up my fellow ghosts, and we shall be victorious!!

lines.speaker: Gravingas
lines.text: Rise together, Ghosts without a cause!!

lines.speaker: Gravingas
lines.text: United we conquer - divided we fall!!

lines.speaker: Gravingas
lines.text: Let Necrovarus know we want out!!

lines.speaker: Gravingas
lines.text: Don't stay silent - victory in numbers!!
